mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_consignment_inventory ( issue_from_store, customer_code, branch_code, sku, qty, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{issueFromStore}, #{customerCode}, #{branchCode}, #{sku}, #{qtyDelta}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (issue_from_store, customer_code, branch_code, sku) DO UPDATE SET qty = customer_consignment_inventory.qty + EXCLUDED.qty, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO supplier_book_value_inventory ( store, sku, supplier_code, supplier_contract, purchase_qty, closing_qty, unbill_qty, period_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{store}, #{sku}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierContract}, 0, #{qtyDelta}, 0, CURRENT_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (store, sku, supplier_code, supplier_contract) DO UPDATE SET closing_qty = supplier_book_value_inventory.closing_qty + EXCLUDED.closing_qty, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, period_date = CURRENT_DATE

INSERT INTO unpost_staging_inventory ( sku, location, sales_qty, return_qty, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sku}, #{location}, #{salesDelta}, #{returnDelta}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (sku, location) DO UPDATE SET sales_qty = unpost_staging_inventory.sales_qty + EXCLUDED.sales_qty, return_qty = unpost_staging_inventory.return_qty + EXCLUDED.return_qty, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
